item.title: Issue #2750 created
item.description:
`fn:unparsed-text`, `fn:unparsed-binary`: make them nondeterministic?

The functions fn:unparsed-text and fn:unparsed-binary are still tagged as ·deterministic·. A rule says:

Implementations may provide user options that relax the requirement for the function to return deterministic results.

Should we make the function ·nondeterministic· by default? In particular for binary data, I doubt someone expects all data to be possibly kept available until a query has been completely evaluated.

There is one test that may need to be updated (fn-unparsed-text-054a).
